measurement_status.note: Reach values labeled kinematic_path_translation_upper_bound_m are asset-derived path-length upper bounds, not sampled reachable-workspace proofs. Final reachability must be verified by Phase 3 IK/planning tests.

reach_measurements_m.note: Upper bound is sum of nested MJCF body translation norms along base -> ee_right. It includes torso height and lateral shoulder offset.

gripper.success_contact_seed: all geoms under MJCF ancestor robotiq_2f85

franka.name: Franka Panda + PandaGripper
franka.runtime_prefix: robot0_ for arm, gripper0_right_ for gripper in compiled MJCF

reach_measurements_m.note: Upper bound is sum of nested MJCF body translation norms along base -> right_hand plus gripper eef offset.

base_height_difference_m.interpretation: TORC Motoman right arm enters the workspace from a high torso/shoulder. Franka must be explicitly placed relative to the TORC table/workspace; copying Motoman base transforms will put the Franka TCP in the wrong vertical envelope.

arm_reach_envelope_difference_m.interpretation: The path-length upper bound is not the limiting factor for Franka; the larger issue is base placement, joint limits, wrist/gripper geometry, and collision clearance. Reachability must be proven by IK/planning samples over the TORC workspace.

gripper_opening_difference_m.interpretation: Franka opens about 9 mm less than TORC's Robotiq command in the validated asset, so CGN openings and width filters must be clamped to Franka limits.

tcp_mismatch_m.franka_required_hand_depth: must be recalibrated from Panda finger pad contact geometry; do not reuse 0.11
tcp_mismatch_m.interpretation: TORC grasp poses target Motoman/Robotiq EE after a 0.11 m local approach shift. Franka must define TCP at gripper0_right_grip_site and build contact/pregrasp from low-level CGN fields or an explicitly adapted pose contract.

collision_model_difference.torc: Motoman CuRobo spheres plus Robotiq ignored links and extra EE spheres
collision_model_difference.franka: Panda link collision meshes plus Panda finger/pad boxes; new CuRobo collision spheres required
collision_model_difference.interpretation: No Motoman collision link names, ignored links, or Robotiq extra-sphere layout can be reused.

replacement_decision.perception: unchanged algorithmically, but robot camera names, workspace pose, and segmentation exclusions must be parameterized
replacement_decision.grasp: reparameterized around Franka TCP, finger opening, pad geometry, and contact depth
replacement_decision.planning: reconfigured with Franka CuRobo YAML/URDF/MJCF-derived collision spheres and panda TCP frame
replacement_decision.execution: replaced with Franka/Panda execution services and gripper command semantics
replacement_decision.simulation: rewritten around robosuite Panda MJCF bodies, joints, actuators, cameras, and contact geoms
replacement_decision.visualization: updated for Franka cameras, TCP, and Panda gripper marker geometry
